audit_scope: first-cut template validation · 3 pages · index + 2 detail exemplars (rich-source + thin-source)
rule_changes_since_v1_audit: tone-of-voice §3 · §Sources block carve-outs revoked · always remove
section-authoring spec-template + SKILL.md · §Sources row removed from canonical ordering
page-reviewer SKILL.md · §Sources flag changed from carve-out-aware to always-CRITICAL
agents-spec D18 · index drops §05, detail drops §09; provenance moves to inline eyebrows + YAML metadata
tools/build_agents.py · render_index + render_detail no longer emit Sources section
3 pages re-rendered (~1.1KB smaller each); grep confirms 0 'Sources' hits across all 3
dimensions_note: Tone-of-voice climbed from 70 to 80 (Sources blocks no longer in violation since they're gone). Cross-page still 50; P7 nav-wiring intentionally not run yet — exclude as N/A and the score is ~86 (B+).

findings.issue: Renderer outputs raw ISO dates: 2026-01-15, 2026-03-06, 2026-04-06. Tone-of-voice §4 mandates DD-MMM-YYYY.
findings.fix: Add a date formatter to tools/build_agents.py: convert ISO YYYY-MM-DD to DD-MMM-YYYY before rendering ifr-date pills. Template-level fix.

findings.section: §02 The agents · by value-chain track (index page)
findings.issue: Index hosts 15 'Pending' card stubs alongside 2 live cards. Honesty-register fine ('Pending' label is honest), but visually reads as an incomplete deliverable.
findings.fix: render_index() · skip stub cards entirely. Per band, render only live cards + a single muted line: 'Plan · 1 of 4 published · 3 more extracting'.

findings.issue: Three In-flight milestones dated Jan-15, Mar-06, Apr-06 — all in the past today (02-May-2026). Page reads as if planned items haven't shipped.
findings.fix: Author judgment: (a) move shipped milestones to Live today, (b) tag '(shipped DD-MMM-YYYY)' / '(slipped, new ETA)', or (c) repopulate with current 90-day plan. Needs source-of-truth from Aushin G / Shahid K.

findings.issue: Footer renders 'Owner · Salman Saudagar (COO, Fynd) · v0.8.4' — site-wide footer from tools/site_chrome.py. Per canonical convention, footer should be copyright-only.
findings.fix: Out of scope (site-wide pre-existing). Flag for separate site-wide cleanup.

findings.issue: /agents/ not yet linked from home (index.html), Tracks mega-menu, or /catalog/. Apex reader has no path into the catalog.
findings.fix: P7 nav-wiring task. ~3 hr per spec phase plan. Ship blocker for the section.

findings.issue: ZIP in-flight date is '2026 H2' — neither DD-MMM-YYYY nor a recognised quarter format.
findings.fix: Either swap to a specific date or render quarter as 'Q3 2026'. If milestone has no committed date, drop from In-flight and move to Roadmap.

findings.issue: Hero pill row places 4 pills inline. On 1440px sits on one line; on 768-1024px wraps to 2.
findings.fix: Acceptable. Confirm on mobile (375px) that pills wrap cleanly.

removed_findings_v2.reason: v1 finding 'M1 · ZIP §09 Sources fails carve-out test' — moot. §Sources blocks now removed from all pages by D18 rule update; tone-of-voice §3 carve-outs revoked across the board.

v1 finding 'H1 · Farooq Adam full-name source citation' — moot in rendered output. The §09 Sources block where this rendered no longer exists. The author's first-name-only citation persists as a `source_citations:` YAML metadata field but is never rendered to the page; left as-is per D18 (YAML provenance metadata is developer-facing, not page-facing).

strengths: Banned-vocab sweep clean across all 3 pages — no transformative / world-class / leverages / unlocks / empowers / enables.
Honesty contract on the ZIP §04 architecture — yellow 'Detail expanding · ETA <date>' block rather than fabricating internal architecture details. Sets precedent for the other 14 thin-source agents.
8-section template (was 9) renders identically across both detail pages with no per-agent special cases — proves the renderer scales.

Workflow visual tiering (D11) works as designed: ZIP renders Tier-B Accenture s37 image with caption + clickable lightbox; Cortex Planning renders the step strip alone with no image (Tier D), and the page still reads complete.

Provenance survives the §Sources removal — workflow steps cite Farooq §1.4, image captions cite Accenture s37, hero stat-tile context lines cite source slides. Apex reader can verify without a trailing block.
blockers_to_ship_v1: H1 · drop or restyle 15 'Pending' index cards
H2 · cortex-planning past-date In-flight milestones · author judgment
M2 · P7 nav wiring (separate phase, planned)
non_blockers: L1 · hero pill row mobile wrap
